name: polaris
description: Exposes governed Polaris skill wrappers and compact read-only status helpers for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run governed Polaris skills and inspect taskchain status
interface.longDescription: Provides thin Codex skill wrappers for Polaris governed workflows plus compact polaris_status and polaris_loop_status helpers backed by the local Polaris CLI or current-state fallback. Skill wrappers route through .polaris/skills/ROUTING.md and canonical SKILL.md packets; they do not implement a parallel runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use $polaris-run to execute a governed Polaris cluster
Use $polaris-analyze to analyze a Polaris issue
Use $polaris-tools to check compact Polaris run state
